narrative:
Cols 82-H (precinct in Franklin County) has 1,327 registered voters, with 59.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 18.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.5%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.9 percentage points.
